mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_community_post.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO community_post ( post_id, member_id, category, title, content, view_count, like_count, report_count, is_visible, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{post_id}, #{member_id},
LOWER(TRIM(#{category})),
#{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 'Y',
CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS DATE), CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS DATE) )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post cp
LEFT JOIN member m ON cp.member_id = m.member_id
cp.is_visible = 'Y'
AND ( LOWER(TRIM(#{category})) = 'all' OR LOWER(TRIM(cp.category)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{category})) )
AND cp.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND cp.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT cp.post_id, cp.member_id, LOWER(TRIM(cp.category)) AS category, cp.title, cp.content, NVL(cp.view_count, 0) AS view_count, NVL(cp.like_count, 0) AS like_count, NVL(cp.report_count, 0) AS report_count, cp.created_at, cp.updated_at, m.nickname,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY
NVL(cp.view_count, 0) DESC, cp.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, cp.post_id DESC
NVL(cp.like_count, 0) DESC, cp.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, cp.post_id DESC
cp.created_at DESC NULLS LAST, cp.post_id DESC
) AS find_num
FROM community_post cp
LEFT JOIN member m ON cp.member_id = m.member_id
cp.is_visible = 'Y'
AND ( LOWER(TRIM(#{category})) = 'all' OR LOWER(TRIM(cp.category)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{category})) )
AND cp.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND cp.content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
)
WHERE find_num BETWEEN #{startNum} AND #{endNum}
ORDER BY find_num

SELECT cp.post_id, cp.member_id, LOWER(TRIM(cp.category)) AS category, cp.title, cp.content, NVL(cp.like_count, 0) AS like_count, NVL(cp.view_count, 0) AS view_count, NVL(cp.report_count, 0) AS report_count, cp.created_at, cp.updated_at, m.nickname, m.profile_image_url FROM community_post cp LEFT JOIN member m ON cp.member_id = m.member_id WHERE cp.post_id = #{id} AND cp.is_visible = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET category = LOWER(TRIM(#{category})), title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS DATE) WHERE post_id = #{post_id} AND is_visible = 'Y'
UPDATE community_post SET is_visible = 'N', updated_at = CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS DATE) WHERE post_id = #{id} AND is_visible = 'Y'
UPDATE community_post SET view_count = NVL(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE post_id = #{post_id} AND is_visible = 'Y'
UPDATE community_post SET report_count = NVL(report_count, 0) + 1 WHERE post_id = #{post_id} AND is_visible = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_visible = 'Y'

SELECT post_id, member_id, LOWER(TRIM(category)) AS category, title, content, NVL(view_count, 0) AS view_count, NVL(like_count, 0) AS like_count, NVL(report_count, 0) AS report_count, created_at, updated_at FROM community_post WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_visible = 'Y' ORDER BY created_at DESC NULLS LAST, post_id DESC
